meta.description: TASK-102 · Triggered by lifecycle events (first_mission_completed, stalled_user, plan_upgraded). Classifies the event, loads workspace context, and dispatches the appropriate follow-up action: email sequence, re-engagement nudge, or upgrade confirmation.

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Build Follow-Up Context').item.json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, event_type: ctx.event_type, action: 're_engage', user_id: ctx.user_id } }];

const ctx = $('Build Follow-Up Context').item.json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, event_type: ctx.event_type, action: 'cancellation_flow', user_id: ctx.user_id } }];
